signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2.2% YoY, Below Forecasts of 2.4% | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][3]

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, undershooting market expectations of 2.4% amid oil price surges from the Iran conflict; core inflation eased to 2.2% from 2.3%.[1][3] Monthly CPI rose 0.3%, matching February but below the 0.6% forecast
